commands.statement: CREATE (person:Person { personId: randomUUID(), name: $PersonName, born: toInteger($Born), createdBy: 'CYP020', createdAt: datetime() }) CREATE (movie:Movie { movieId: randomUUID(), title: $MovieTitle, released: toInteger($Released), createdBy: 'CYP020', createdAt: datetime() }) RETURN person.name AS personName, movie.title AS movieTitle, movie.released AS released
CREATE (person:Person { personId: randomUUID(), name: $PersonName, born: toInteger($Born), createdAt: datetime() }) RETURN person.personId AS personId, person.name AS name, person.born AS born

MATCH (person:Person {name: $PersonName}) MATCH (firstMovie:Movie {title: $FirstMovieTitle}) MATCH (secondMovie:Movie {title: $SecondMovieTitle}) CREATE (person)-[:REVIEWED {rating: 5, source: 'CYP020', createdAt: datetime()}]->(firstMovie) CREATE (person)-[:REVIEWED {rating: 4, source: 'CYP020', createdAt: datetime()}]->(secondMovie) RETURN person.name AS personName, firstMovie.title AS firstMovieTitle, secondMovie.title AS secondMovieTitle, 2 AS relationshipsCreated

MATCH (person:Person {name: $PersonName}) MATCH (movie:Movie {title: $MovieTitle}) CREATE (person)-[review:REVIEWED { rating: toInteger($Rating), source: 'CYP020', createdAt: datetime() }]->(movie) RETURN person.name AS personName, movie.title AS movieTitle, type(review) AS relationshipType, review.rating AS rating
MATCH (person:Person {name: $PersonName}) SET person.nickname = $Nickname, person.updatedAt = datetime() RETURN person.name AS name, person.nickname AS nickname, person.updatedAt AS updatedAt

MATCH (movie:Movie {title: $MovieTitle}) SET movie.tagline = $Tagline, movie.category = $Category, movie.updatedAt = datetime() RETURN movie.title AS title, movie.tagline AS tagline, movie.category AS category, movie.updatedAt AS updatedAt

MERGE (movie:Movie {title: $MovieTitle}) ON CREATE SET movie.released = toInteger($Released), movie.createdAt = datetime(), movie.createdBy = 'CYP020' ON MATCH SET movie.lastMergedAt = datetime(), movie.lastMergedBy = 'CYP020' RETURN movie.title AS title, movie.released AS released, movie.createdAt AS createdAt, movie.lastMergedAt AS lastMergedAt

MERGE (movie:Movie {title: $MovieTitle}) ON CREATE SET movie.createdAt = datetime(), movie.createdBy = 'CYP020' SET movie.released = toInteger($Released), movie.tagline = $Tagline, movie.updatedAt = datetime() RETURN movie.title AS title, movie.released AS released, movie.tagline AS tagline, movie.updatedAt AS updatedAt
OPTIONAL MATCH (person:Person {name: $PersonName}) WITH collect(person) AS people FOREACH (item IN people | DETACH DELETE item) RETURN $PersonName AS personName, size(people) AS deletedCount
